summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BlueMind AI React application with new auth flow. All landing page, auth selection, register, login, and dashboard features working perfectly with excellent user experience.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, logo, title, subtitle, description
Landing page Get Started button navigates to /auth/register
Landing page Login button navigates to /auth/login
Landing page shows 3 feature cards (Smart Chat, Reminders, AI-Powered)
Auth Selection page shows Login and Create Account options
Auth Selection Continue as Guest navigates to /chat
Register page form with Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password fields
Register page shows password requirements validation
Register page password mismatch error validation
Register page Create Account button submission with toast and loading state
Login page form with Email, Password, Remember me checkbox
Login page forgot password link is clickable
Login page submission with toast and loading state
Navigation between auth pages using links works correctly
Back button navigation works on all auth pages
Dashboard pages (chat, reminders, feedback) work with sidebar navigation
Sidebar navigation between dashboard pages
Sidebar logo navigation to landing page
Logout button navigation to landing page
Dark glassmorphism design with purple/blue gradients
Smooth hover animations on buttons and cards
Responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop viewports)
Form validation and accessibility features
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Simulated auth with setTimeout delays working correctly
Toast notifications displaying properly
Page transitions with framer-motion animations
